dialogs.script:
say: Please hurry!
say: Lead me back to my dad, I'm right behind you!

say: Oh come on...
say: You're a bad person!
say: Fine... will you at least take me back to my dad?
choice: Will you take me to him?
clearflag: quest1_refused_cici
setflag: quest1_found_cici
startfollow
say: Okay! Lead the way, {player}!

say: ...
say: I'm lost...
say: I can't find my way back home.
say: Can you take me back to my dad?
choice: Will you take me to him?
setflag: quest1_found_cici
startfollow
say: Oh thank you! Lead the way, {player}!
say: I'll follow right behind you!
